benefits.description: Achieved noticeable tan over 60 days; enabled sun exposure without severe burning in intense Australian UV
Reported feeling full more quickly, ate less; user noted decreased appetite
Beard regrowth changed from ginger to dark brown color
Increased arousal and sexual activity; heightened sensitivity to sensory stimuli (e.g., pleasant smells)

side_effects.description: Throbbing, painful erections; high dose (2500mcg) caused severe 6-hour painful erection
Increased irritability; user reported getting angry quicker, required learning to control
Freckles became darker and more prominent; approximately 20-30 new freckles appeared
Delayed sleep cycle when injecting at night; switched to daytime injections to resolve
Occasional redness, stinging, small drops of blood at injection site
Skin scars and birthmarks became more prominent
Face felt flushed and tingly sensation within 10 minutes of first injection
Heavier sleeping; felt like more sleep was required overall

protocol_notes: User reports double the recommended dosage due to height (5'11") and weight (101kg). Used 7 vials over 65 days. Total tanning time in sun was 18-19 hours over 60 days with varying UV protection (sunscreen and clothing). By day 60, user reported maintenance dosing once weekly. User is in Melbourne, Australia and states MT2 was obtained through pharmacy/doctor referral to Australian company with pre-assessment. Cost: $800 AUD including verified MT2, insulin needles, and swabs. User describes this as providing extra skin layer protection in addition to continued sunscreen use. Ethnicity: Spanish, Scottish, English, French, 1/128 Aboriginal. Weight before: 101kg; after: 98kg (3kg loss).
